positive: Minimalist geometric celestial forest scene, featuring abstract stylized mountain range silhouettes interwoven with glowing bioluminescent flora. The central composition is dominated by a stylized crescent moon and two abstract, interlocking constellation shapes formed by glowing lines. Color palette: deep midnight blue and indigo background, accented by pops of neon teal, bright gold, and lavender highlights. The style should be highly graphic, inspired by Art Deco and abstract linocut printing. Focus on clean lines, strong negative space, and high contrast. Cinematic dramatic lighting, designed for seamless repeating apparel pattern.
